title: HOWAF Christmas Activity Pack Giant Colouring Poster for Kids, Merry Christmas Coloring Books Santa Christmas Tree Christmas Table Cloth Colouring Paper for Boys Girls Xmas Decorations
features: Christmas Decorations Paper: You will get 1pcs Merry Christmas Colouring Poster Christmas Table Cloth + 12pcs colouring pens in different colors, the size of the Giant Colouring Poster is 1188 * 840mm, super giant Christmas drawing paper offer beautiful patterns and exciting tasks on the subject of Christmas for kids boys and girls.

Funny Christmas Activity Pack for Children: Our Christmas Coloring Books are designed with many fun Xmas Decorations patterns, such as Santa Claus, Christmas tree, reindeer, snowflake, etc. The Colouring Paper is a great way to stay in touch with friends and family, so many children can paint it at the same time, which will create a warm and sweet atmosphere for Christmas party. A lot of fun for hours!

High Quality: The Christmas tablecloths Colouring Poster Set with 12 different colors pens, and the poster is made of high quality paper, lightweight and strong, not easy to fade or tear. You can colour your own Christmas colouring paper and use it to decorate your home, bedroom, classroom, wall, door wherever you like.

Perfect Christmas Gifts for Kids: Our kids Christmas party games make children's eyes light up and make the Christmas party an unforgettable experience for kids boys and girls, it develops good hand and eye coordination and improves creativity for the little guests our Christmas paper Table Cloth are great ideal Christmas gifts for children.

Buy With Confidence: we will provide 100% after-sales service about these Christmas Activity Pack Giant Colouring Poster for Kids, please contact us if you have any doubts or questions, we will reply you as soon as we see the news. More Christmas Table Placemats and Coaster, Christmas Giant Gift Bags, Christmas Hanging Swirl Decorations, Christmas Nail Art Plates, Christmas Socks, Christmas Temporary Tattoos, Christmas Aprons and Santa Key for tables please visit Howaf storefront.
